2604.08340.title: PokeGym: A Visually-Driven Long-Horizon Benchmark for Vision-Language Models
2604.08340.paper_summary: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in static visual understanding, their deployment in complex 3D embodied environments remains severely limited. Existing benchmarks suffer from four critical deficiencies: (1) passive perception tasks circumvent interactive dynamics; (2) simplified 2D environments fail to assess depth perception; (3) privileged state leakage bypasses genuine visual processing; and (4) human evaluation is prohibitively expensive and unscalable. We introduce PokeGym, a visually-driven long-horizon benchmark instantiated within Pokemon Legends: Z-A, a visually complex 3D open-world Role-Playing Game. PokeGym enforces strict code-level isolation: agents operate solely on raw RGB observations while an independent evaluator verifies success via memory scanning, ensuring pure vision-based decision-making and automated, scalable assessment. The benchmark comprises 30 tasks (30-220 steps) spanning navigation, interaction, and mixed scenarios, with three instruction granularities (Visual-Guided, Step-Guided, Goal-Only) to systematically deconstruct visual grounding, semantic reasoning, and autonomous exploration capabilities. Our evaluation reveals a key limitation of current VLMs: physical deadlock recovery, rather than high-level planning, constitutes the primary bottleneck, with deadlocks showing a strong negative correlation with task success. Furthermore, we uncover a metacognitive divergence: weaker models predominantly suffer from Unaware Deadlocks (oblivious to entrapment), whereas advanced models exhibit Aware Deadlocks (recognizing entrapment yet failing to recover). These findings highlight the need to integrate explicit spatial intuition into VLM architectures. The code and benchmark will be available on GitHub.
2604.08340.paper_summary_zh: 儘管視覺-語言模型（VLMs）在靜態視覺理解方面取得了顯著進展，但它們在複雜的三維具身環境中的應用仍然受到嚴重限制。現有基準存在四個關鍵缺陷：（1）被動感知任務繞過了互動動態；（2）簡化的二維環境無法評估深度感知；（3）特權狀態洩漏繞過了真正的視覺處理；（4）人類評估的成本過高且無法擴展。我們介紹了PokeGym，一個視覺驅動的長期基準，實現在《寶可夢傳說：Z-A》這個視覺複雜的三維開放世界角色扮演遊戲中。PokeGym強制執行嚴格的代碼級隔離：代理僅基於原始RGB觀察運作，而獨立的評估者通過記憶掃描來驗證成功，確保純粹的基於視覺的決策和自動化、可擴展的評估。該基準包括30個任務（30-220步），涵蓋導航、互動和混合場景，並具有三種指令粒度（視覺引導、步驟引導、僅目標），以系統性地拆解視覺基礎、語義推理和自主探索能力。我們的評估揭示了當前VLMs的一個關鍵限制：物理死鎖恢復，而非高層次規劃，構成了主要瓶頸，死鎖與任務成功之間顯示出強烈的負相關。此外，我們發現了一種元認知的分歧：較弱的模型主要遭受無意識死鎖（對困境無感），而先進模型則表現出意識死鎖（認識到困境但無法恢復）。這些發現突顯了將明確的空間直覺整合到VLM架構中的必要性。代碼和基準將在GitHub上提供。
2604.08340.author: Ruizhi Zhang et.al.
2604.08340.authors: Ruizhi Zhang, Ye Huang, Yuangang Pan, Chuanfu Shen, Zhilin Liu, Ting Xie, Wen Li, Lixin Duan
